mode_notes: External APIs (Fireworks AI) and compiler tools (hipify, hipcc) are mocked. Switch mode to 'hackathon' when real services become available.

1.1.notes: Successfully created the complete empty project folder and file layout matching docs/03_PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md exactly.

2.1.notes: Wrote backend/Dockerfile with dual-context build support, matching docs/15_DOCKER_SETUP.md spec. Set up backend/requirements.txt with placeholder fastapi and uvicorn dependencies.

2.2.notes: Wrote frontend/Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml. Configured build instructions and container definitions for all four core services with custom command entrypoint fallbacks for unstarted pre-hackathon scripts.

2.3.notes: Wrote .env.example with all environment variables required by HIPForge, including Redis connection, Fireworks API key placeholder, GPU pinning (HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES), and pre-hackathon mock toggles.

3.1.notes: FastAPI application entrypoint initialized with CORS middleware, health API endpoints setup and manually verified via Uvicorn on localhost:8000.

3.2.notes: All REST API route stubs implemented and returning HTTP 501 Not Implemented.

3.3.notes: Implemented WebSocket connection manager, stream lifecycle handler, and route stub at /ws/v1/migrate/{migration_id}/stream, verified via automated test client.

4.1.notes: Implemented Redis connection pool, client factory, and comprehensive key and channel builder functions in backend/app/redis/client.py and backend/app/redis/keys.py. Verified with unit checks.

fireworks_ai.swap_trigger: Set USE_MOCK_AI=false in .env when Fireworks API key is available

hipify_clang.swap_trigger: Set USE_MOCK_COMPILER=false in .env when ROCm is available on the machine

hipcc.swap_trigger: Set USE_MOCK_COMPILER=false in .env when ROCm is available on the machine

next_action: Implement Redis queue operations (LPUSH, BRPOP, active) under Session 4.2.
